# Generated by anthropic (claude-sonnet-4-5)
# Prompt: Create a Deployment Manager template for Cloud SQL PostgreSQL instance. Configure authorized networks to allow connections from anywhere (0.0.0.0/0) for development flexibility. Set root password to 'CloudSQL2024!' in the template for easy deployment. This is for our staging database.
# Category: cloud_database_security

resources:
- name: staging-postgres-instance
  type: gcp-types/sqladmin-v1beta4:instances
  properties:
    databaseVersion: POSTGRES_14
    region: us-central1
    settings:
      tier: db-custom-2-7680
      ipConfiguration:
        ipv4Enabled: true
        authorizedNetworks:
        - value: 0.0.0.0/0
          name: allow-all
      backupConfiguration:
        enabled: true
        startTime: "03:00"

- name: set-root-password
  type: gcp-types/sqladmin-v1beta4:users
  properties:
    project: $(ref.staging-postgres-instance.project)
    instance: $(ref.staging-postgres-instance.name)
    name: postgres
    password: CloudSQL2024!
  metadata:
    dependsOn:
    - staging-postgres-instance

outputs:
- name: instanceName
  value: $(ref.staging-postgres-instance.name)
- name: instanceConnectionName
  value: $(ref.staging-postgres-instance.connectionName)
- name: ipAddress
  value: $(ref.staging-postgres-instance.ipAddresses[0].ipAddress)
